title: OreUI
description: The new Bedrock OreUI for Java Edition. By zhengxuan.
body:
**OreUI for Bedrock Edition on Java Edition!**

This resource pack allows the Java Edition UI to resemble the new Bedrock Edition OreUI, with changes including the main menu, crafting table, furnace, blast furnace, enchantment table, options, inventory, achievements interface, backpack, recipe interface, beacon, and so on.

_Tips:Although this resource pack is designed for version 1.21.4, it is theoretically compatible with nearby versions, such as 1.20.x to 1.21.x._
